ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* Team logo URL */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Team's primary color */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Team's secondary color */,
  "current_coach" TEXT /* Team's current coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2007-08) */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Champion of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-season relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus-minus rating */,
  "playoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of playoff wins */,
  "playoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of playoff losses */,
  "playoff_series_won" INTEGER /* Number of playoff series won */,
  "playoff_seed" INTEGER /* Playoff seed */,
  "conference_standings" TEXT /* Conference standings */,
  "division_standings" TEXT /* Division standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team-season relationship */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Statistic being ranked (e.g., FGM, FGA, FG_PCT) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team for the specified statistic */,
  "playoff_seed_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team's playoff seed */,
  "conference_standings_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in conference standings */,
  "division_standings_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in division standings */,
  "net_rating_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team's net rating */,
  "offense_rating_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team's offense rating */,
  "defense_rating_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team's defense rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranks_team_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_season_id") REFERENCES team_seasons ("team_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (regular season or playoff) */,
  "game_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win or loss) */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods played */,
  "pace" REAL /* Pace of the game */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "favorite_team" INTEGER /* Favorite team of the user */,
  "favorite_player" TEXT /* Favorite player of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  "data_downloaded" TEXT /* Data downloaded by the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_conference" (
  "team_conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-conference relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Central, Pacific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_conference_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
